user_message: Working on Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery's deployment blockers. Got the exec meeting notes -- help me pull the context.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Patricia Kim <patricia.kim@libertysdeli.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-11 15:48 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery deployment blockers

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with deployment blockers. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

---
From: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
To: Patricia Kim <patricia.kim@libertysdeli.com>
Date: 2024-02-16 11:31 EST
Subject: URGENT: deployment blockers Issue at Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about deployment blockers. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Patricia Kim <patricia.kim@libertysdeli.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-07 10:52 EST
Subject: Re: deployment blockers Discussion - Next Steps

Our team encountered some challenges with deployment blockers. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Liberty's Delightful Sinful Bakery: the current vendor contract has a 90-day exit clause we need to plan around

usability_anchors: Score 5: Complete, well-structured output matching the Customer Outage/Complaint Email -> Triage + Escalation template with all required artifacts present and actionable
Score 3: Output covers main requirements but missing one or two secondary artifacts or lacking specificity
Score 1: Output is generic, missing key artifacts, or fails to address the specific request
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct deployment blockers decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
